message:
Split large vendor chunks for better lazy loading (#4651)

- Split charts-vendor (1.6M) into echarts-vendor (1.1M, lazy-only)
  and recharts-vendor (388K) — echarts is only used by ParetoFrontier
- Extract three-vendor (882K) from vendor — three.js + @react-three
  only used by globe animation and KubeCraft3D card
- Vendor chunk reduced from 1.2M to 327K (-73%)

All flagged drilldown views and page components (#4647) are already
lazy-loaded via safeLazy() in DrillDownModal.tsx and App.tsx.

Fixes #4647, #4649

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
